compiled_state.title: RED: Add fix-bug RED dispatch test assertion
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description
Modify `tests/skills/test_fix_bug_skill_escalated_section.py` (or create a new test) to assert that fix-bug SKILL.md Step 5 references `dso:red-test-writer` dispatch and the shared escalation template. Test must FAIL before Step 5 is modified.

Test approach: structural validation — grep fix-bug SKILL.md for 'dso:red-test-writer' and 'red-task-escalation' references. Acceptable per exemption (metadata/schema validation of a skill file).

## File Impact
- MODIFY: tests/skills/test_fix_bug_skill_escalated_section.py (or tests/hooks/test-fix-bug-skill.sh)

## TDD Requirement
This IS the RED test task. Must fail before GREEN task modifies SKILL.md.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
- [ ] Test file contains assertion for dso:red-test-writer reference
  Verify: grep -q 'red.test.writer' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test_fix_bug_skill_escalated_section.py || grep -q 'red.test.writer' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/hooks/test-fix-bug-skill.sh
- [ ] Running the test returns non-zero (RED)
  Verify: python3 -m pytest $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test_fix_bug_skill_escalated_section.py -x 2>&1 | grep -q FAILED
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 1/6: Ticket read. Task: add RED test asserting fix-bug SKILL.md Step 5 references dso:red-test-writer dispatch and shared escalation template (red-task-escalation). Test must fail before GREEN task modifies SKILL.md.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: Read relevant test files and SKILL.md. Confirmed: (1) test_fix_bug_skill_escalated_section.py has 8 existing tests covering escalated section slots, agent prompts, veto, resolution agent, terminal escalation. (2) SKILL.md Step 5 (lines 384-399) has no reference to dso:red-test-writer or red-task-escalation. grep confirms neither string exists in SKILL.md. RED test will fail as required.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6: Added two RED test functions in new class TestStep5RedTestWriterDispatch to tests/skills/test_fix_bug_skill_escalated_section.py: (1) test_step5_dispatches_red_test_writer — asserts 'dso:red-test-writer' present in SKILL.md; (2) test_step5_references_red_task_escalation_template — asserts 'red-task-escalation' present in SKILL.md. Both must fail (RED) because SKILL.md Step 5 has no such references.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 4/6: Test file edited. Running test suite now to confirm RED (failing) state.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: Test run confirmed RED. test_step5_dispatches_red_test_writer FAILED with AssertionError — 'dso:red-test-writer' not found in SKILL.md content. 8 existing tests still pass. Stopping at first failure with -x flag, so test_step5_references_red_task_escalation_template also fails (not yet reached). Both new tests are properly RED.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: RED test task complete. File modified: tests/skills/test_fix_bug_skill_escalated_section.py. Added class TestStep5RedTestWriterDispatch with two failing test methods: test_step5_dispatches_red_test_writer (fails: 'dso:red-test-writer' absent from SKILL.md) and test_step5_references_red_task_escalation_template (fails: 'red-task-escalation' absent from SKILL.md). All 8 pre-existing tests pass. Ready for GREEN task to modify fix-bug SKILL.md Step 5.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
